titleStmt.title: SII 22.244: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 244. (A.R. No. 244 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE EAST WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE KṚIPĀNĀTHA SHRINE. RĀJ. KULŌTTUṄGA (II)—10th YEAR (A.D. 1142-43).

summary.p: The inscription has the introduction Pūmēvu vaḷar etc. It records a gift of 32 cows for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple by Kampaṉ alias Vikramaśōḻa-Periyaraiyaṉ, a farmer kuḍippaḷḷi of Eṉṟattūr the eastern quarter of Śri Madhurāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam an independent village (taniyūr) of Kaḷattūr-kōṭṭam a division of Jayangoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. Tiruppaṉaṅgāḍu was situated in Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam of the same maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevu vaḷar tirupponmārvu puṇara ṉāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vicayamāmakaḷ velpuyattiru
ppa Icaiyin celvi Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟañca niṇilamaṭantai yait tirumaṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷar tarum Aṇimuṭika
vitteṉa maṇimuṭi cūṭi mallaiñālattup palluyiṟ kellām Ellaiyi linpam Iyalviṉileyti veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅ
kolocci vāḻi pallūḻi yāḻi naṭappac cempon virasiṅhāsaṉattup puvaṉamuḻutumuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korā
jakesaripatmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattuk kāli
yūṟkoṭṭattuk kaḻumalaṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruppaṉaṅkāṭuṭaiyāṟku Im maṇṭalattuk kaḷattūṟkoṭṭattu taṉiyūr śrīmadhurāntaka
ccaturvedimaṅkalattuk kiḻpiṭākai Eṉṟattūṟ kuṭippaḷḷi kampaṉāṉa vikkiramacoḻap periyaraiyanen Ittevaṟku vaitta tirununtāvi
ḷakku Oṟṟukku viṭṭa pacu muppattiraṇṭum Ittevar sannidhiye Ācandrādittavarai cellakkaṭavatāka nirvārttukkuṭutten Itukku Aḻivu
paṇṇuvār keṅkaiyiṭaik kumariyiṭai ceytār ceyta pāpattaip paṭuvār Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 22.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
